abstract.text: This enum defines keyboard-specific actions, and is also
a namespace for action-related types.

inlineContent.text: Keyboard actions can be used to trigger keyboard-related
operation, for instance when tapping a button, when some
event happens or programatically by triggering an action
The documentation for each action describes the standard
that don’t have a standard behavior must be handled with

Deletes backwards when pressed, and repeats until released.
